name: varolyn-tracker
description: Varolyn Healthcare — Zomato-style live tracking for home healthcare visits (100% web-based PWA, free & open-source)

scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=services/gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/tracking" "npm run dev --workspace=services/consent" "npm run dev --workspace=services/appointment" "npm run dev --workspace=services/link" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification" "npm run dev --workspace=services/audit"
